ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
IF( NOT(ISBLANK( IP_LastPassedToTempest2ndTier__c )) && (
ISCHANGED( IP_CandidateIDlegacy__c ) || ISCHANGED( IP_WorkerStartDate__c ) || ISCHANGED( IP_WorkerLeavingDate__c) ) ,True,False)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: These fields can not be changed once the record has been passed to the back office :- Date of Birth Candidate ID Worker start date Consultant ID Worker Leaving date
